_comment: name           (required) Display name shown in the admin tab and event list.
fields         (required) Ordered template fields, may be empty []. Each
item is either a custom field definition or a built-in
array order is the single order shared by the callsign
entry box and the contact-log history list.
bands          (required) Band choices for the status bar, non-empty.
modes          (required) Mode choices for the status bar, non-empty.
duplicate_type (required) How the client warns about dupes, see below.
export         (reserved) Export mapping slot, unused in v1 — leave null.
name: Example (documentation)
_comment_builtins: Built-in fields: a fixed roster every contact can carry regardless of
template, stored as their own columns. Reference them inside the same
fields list as a {name, entry, history, required?, remember?, default?}
object (label / max_length / validation come from the client registry,
NOT the template). All built-ins are optional. Names:
country      Country     (auto-filled from the callsign lookup)
The four auto-filled built-ins are recorded on every contact even when no
template names them; their labels/widths/patterns live in the client, not here.
_comment_fields: Each custom field object takes:
name       (required) Internal key, unique, and not a built-in name.
label      (required) Shown as the input's placeholder / column header.
required   (optional, default false) Blocks logging while blank. Only
enforced when entry is also true (a hidden field can't be
filled at log time).
default    (optional) Initial value; the form resets to it after each log.
max_length (required) Max characters; also sets input width.
remember   (optional, default false) On leaving the callsign box, re-fill
this field from the most recent contact with the same callsign.
validation (optional) {pattern, message}: 'pattern' is a JS regex the
whole value must match (green border on match, red on blur
otherwise — advisory only, never blocks logging); 'message'
is the tooltip explaining the expected format. No other keys
are allowed inside 'validation'.
entry      (required, boolean) Include this field in the callsign entry
box. Independent of 'history' — a field can be entry-only,
history-only, both, or neither (modal-only).
history    (required, boolean) Include this field as a column in the
contact-log history list.

fields._comment: A custom field using every optional parameter. Shown in both the entry box and the history list.
fields.name: exchange
fields.label: Exchange

validation.message: Exchange must be a number then letters, like 3AOR

fields._comment: A built-in reference (no label/max_length/validation — those come from the client registry). entry:false keeps it out of the callsign-entry box; history:true still surfaces it as a contact-log column.
fields.name: country

fields._comment: A minimal custom field: just the required keys. Modal-only (entry:false, history:false) so it can only be filled via the edit modal.
fields.name: serial
fields.label: Serial #

_comment_bands_modes: Any non-empty string lists; shown in the status bar pickers.
_comment_duplicate_type: When entering a callsign already in the log, warn (never block) if it was
worked on... 'band-mode': the same band and mode;
'band-mode-day': the same band and mode during the current UTC day;
'any': any band or mode; 'none': never warn.
